ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "locus" TEXT /* Locus tag of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene function */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species to which the gene belongs */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome location of the gene */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the experimental method */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Detailed protocol or procedure for the method */,
  "references" TEXT /* References or publications related to the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic interaction */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first gene involved in the interaction */,
  "gene2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second gene involved in the interaction */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used to detect the interaction */,
  "fsw_score" REAL /* Functional Synthetic Weight score indicating the strength of the interaction */,
  "compartment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cellular compartment where the interaction occurs */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of the publication or experiment */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the interaction data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_gene2_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene2_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_compartment_id FOREIGN KEY ("compartment_id") REFERENCES compartments ("compartment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compartments" (
  "compartment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cellular compartment */,
  "compartment_name" TEXT /* Name of the cellular compartment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compartment */,
  "parent_compartment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent compartment */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the compartment in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compartment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compartments_parent_compartment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_compartment_id") REFERENCES compartments ("compartment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, genetic counselor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic interaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the interaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_access_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene version */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the gene information */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene information was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the updates made to the gene information */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Detailed changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_versions_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "method_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method version */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the method information */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the method information was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the updates made to the method information */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Detailed changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_versions_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compartment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compartment version */,
  "compartment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compartment */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the compartment information */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the compartment information was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the updates made to the compartment information */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Detailed changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compartment_versions_compartment_id FOREIGN KEY ("compartment_id") REFERENCES compartments ("compartment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction version */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic interaction */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the interaction data */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction data was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the updates made to the interaction data */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Detailed changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_versions_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)
